title: Baked Fish Hash
description: A simple and flavorful dish combining the freshness of fish with the crunch of a hash, all baked to perfection.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place the fish fillets on the prepared baking sheet.
Top each fillet with a spoonful of river hash and a sprinkle of shredded cheese.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with additional river hash if desired.
